## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and topic clusters for HyperExponential's AI-focused insurance content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on topic clusters 1 (AI transformation for commercial insurance) and 2 (comparing AI solutions) for now](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Aim for mid to lower funnel content, which performs better for AEO/GEO and leverages HX's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Consider creating content around specific business lines (e.g., maritime, cyber) to add depth and interest](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Upcoming agentic AI pipeline will improve research and content quality](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Focus

  - [Prioritizing topic clusters 1 (AI transformation) and 2 (comparing AI solutions)](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [Mid to lower funnel content performs better for AEO/GEO](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Avoiding fluffy thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Creating surface area for Google indexing and topic authority](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Considering hidden top-of-funnel content for SEO without featuring on blog](https://fathom.video/share/_4ofdqUxQzN-ierr964cEr4rTapcj7WB?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
